'''Dewt Kluskine''' was the [[Warden/Legends|warden]] of the [[Kessel prison|Imperial Correctional Facility]] at [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]].

Aside from being the warden of the facility, he also oversaw the illegal [[Spice/Legends|spice]] trade. He was a cruel man who delighted in mistreating the slave miners. During an escape attempt by the young [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] slaves, he ordered the [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] to kill them all instead of stunning them. This earned him the hatred of [[Gyylghrard]].

A few years after the [[Life Day massacre|Life Day Massacre]], Gyylghrard was assigned as one of his honor guards. Kluskine believed that he looked more imposing with dangerous-looking aliens as his bodyguards during negotiations from visiting crime lords. During his meeting with [[Fossco]], a [[Toydarian/Legends|Toydarian]] accountant under the employ of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]], Kluskine was decapitated with a [[ceremonial poleaxe]] by Gyylghrard, who was then killed by the stormtroopers.
